tweets.text:
MiniMax is heading to RAISE Week in Paris 🇫🇷

Find us at Booth 32D in Delorme, in a fireside chat on the Ada Lovelace Stage, and at our private executive gathering: RAISE House with MiniMax.

We’ll be talking M3, open weights, multimodal AI, and where frontier AI is moving next — including how MiniMax is helping shape it.

Details below 👇
